_comment: Hand-authored mission DSL for Growing Madness, encoded from games/bloodborne/golden/transcribed/missions-growing-madness.json (verbatim text). Spawn-space icons on this campaign's cards were transcribed as uncertain ({enemy?}) throughout, so all arena/boss spawns use 'anySpawn:<Tile>' (every core tile has exactly one spawn icon). ARROW INVERSION: this campaign's transcription notes encoded 1 arrow as {fast} and 3 arrows as {slow}; the correct mapping is 3 arrows = fast, 1 arrow = slow. Affected cards are corrected here and listed in _fixups. Insight-card branch mapping: Proven Hunter = 15, Still Waiting = 29, Left Alone = 30, Out on the Hunt = 13, Eileen's Approval = 36.

_fixups.note: Transcription encoded the Dodge as {fast} (single arrow). Single arrow = SLOW under the correct mapping; the dodge in custom 'bridge-dodge-on-ability-flip' must be resolved as Dodge ({slow}) or suffer 3 {dmg}.

Transcription encoded 'suffers -1 {fast}' (single arrow icon). The icon means the Attack loses 1 speed arrow, i.e. becomes one step slower; implement custom 'tiny-music-box-slows-gascoigne' as -1 speed arrow on Gascoigne's Attacks.
Transcription encoded FRENZIED SWIPES as {slow} (three arrows). Three arrows = FAST under the correct mapping; replaceAttack speed is encoded 'fast' here, inverting the transcription.
No inversion needed: two arrows = medium either way (RECKLESS ANGER encoded speed 'medium'). Same for card 23.

_unsupported.need: huntTrackSpace trigger — reveal when the Hunt Track reaches the 1st {reset} space (track space 4); interpreter only dispatches startOfHunt / endMoveOnTile triggers
_unsupported.printedText: When the Hunt Track reaches the 1st {reset} space (mark this space with an Insight token): Reveal card 6

_unsupported.need: huntTrackSpace trigger — same as Chapter 1 (track space 4)
_unsupported.printedText: When the Hunt Track reaches the 1st {reset} space (mark this space with an Insight token): Reveal card 22

_unsupported.need: NPC damage aura: after a Hunter in Gascoigne's space Attacks, deal that Enemy 1 extra {dmg} with no Blood Echo on kill. Also decrementOnSlayTypesAtNpc cannot say 'any Enemy' — an explicit list of the five core mobile enemy types is encoded as an approximation
_unsupported.printedText: After a Hunter in his space Attacks, deal that Enemy 1 additional {dmg} (no one gains a Blood Echo if this slays the Enemy). Each time an Enemy is slain in his space, remove 1 token.

_unsupported.need: removeToken effect — remove the Gascoigne npc-follower token placed by card 1
_unsupported.printedText: Remove Father Gascoigne from the map.

_unsupported.need: end-of-round 'no Enemies remain on tile' hunt completion (approximated with slayTagged); per-enemy tags inside one fog arena — the Hunter Mob and Huntsman's Minion both carry tag 3
_unsupported.printedText: Complete the Hunt at the end of a round if no Enemies remain on The Great Bridge tile: Reveal card 5.

_unsupported.need: dodge aura: on reveal and each time the Huntsman's Minion flips Ability, all Hunters on The Great Bridge Dodge ({slow}, see _fixups) or suffer 3 {dmg}. Also hpPool applies to the whole tag; printed pool is for the Hunter Mob only while tag 3 also contains the Minion
_unsupported.printedText: When this card is revealed, and each time Ability is flipped by the Huntsman's Minion, all Hunters on The Great Bridge must Dodge ({fast}) or suffer 3 {dmg}.

_unsupported.need: rooted enemy (spawned Hunter Mob cannot move); reset-loss rule — on {reset} with no Hunter on the space, remove the Survivor token and discard the mission
_unsupported.printedText: It cannot move from this space. [...] On {reset}, if no Hunter is on this space, remove this token and discard this Mission (it can't be completed).

_unsupported.need: second concurrent goal — end a move carrying the token after a {reset} has occurred reveals 10 instead of 9 (goal slot only holds one goal)
_unsupported.printedText: Complete this Mission if you end a move with the token after a {reset} occurs: Reveal card 10.

_unsupported.need: hunter penalty on reveal (suffer 1 {dmg} and Frenzy) and discarding the Survivor token
_unsupported.printedText: Hunter suffers 1 {dmg} and Frenzy, but gains 1 Blood Echo and the Caryll Rune: Blood Rapture reward. Discard the Survivor token.

_unsupported.need: Blood Echo discard decrements the counter — discardConsumablesOnTileDecrements hook covers Consumables only
_unsupported.printedText: While on the Oedon Chapel tile, Hunters may discard their held Blood Echoes. For each one discarded, remove 1 token from this card.

_unsupported.need: tileRevealed-triggered spawn: 1 Church Giant + 1 Church Servant on the Grand Cathedral spawn space when that tile is revealed, tagged 17, persistent through {reset}, no respawn
_unsupported.printedText: When the Grand Cathedral tile is revealed, spawn 1 Church Giant and 1 Church Servant on its {enemy?} space. These Enemies are not removed on {reset}, and do not respawn.

_unsupported.need: reward modifier: Tiny Music Box gains 'when Gascoigne Attacks, his Attack loses 1 speed arrow' (see _fixups)
_unsupported.printedText: When Gascoigne Attacks: Gascoigne's Attack suffers -1 {fast}.

_unsupported.need: apply Frenzy to all Hunters
_unsupported.printedText: All Hunters suffer Frenzy.

_unsupported.need: type-wide replaceAttack — ALL Hunter Mobs replace Basic with RECKLESS ANGER (medium, 2 {dmg}, Frenzy); replaceAttack only targets a mission tag
_unsupported.printedText:
All Hunter Mobs replace their Basic with:
BASIC: RECKLESS ANGER {medium} {dmg} {dmg} Frenzy

_unsupported.need: post-{reset} spawning (1 Hunter Mob on each enemy space, nearest Hunters first) and a conditional decrement qualifier — decrementOnSlay cannot check 'unless the Hunter is Frenzied' (hook encoded without the qualifier)
_unsupported.printedText: After each {reset}, spawn 1 Hunter Mob (if available) on each {enemy?} space, beginning with those closest to Hunters. [...] Each time a Hunter Mob is slain, unless the Hunter is Frenzied, remove 1 token.

_unsupported.need: carried-token condition — completion requires the Hunter holding the Red Jeweled Brooch Insight token to end the move on Barred Window (encoded as plain endMoveOnTile)
_unsupported.printedText: Complete this Mission by ending a move on the Barred Window space with the token: Reveal card 28.

_unsupported.need: Blood Echo discard decrements the counter (same gap as card 14)
_unsupported.printedText: While on the Oedon Chapel tile, Hunters may discard their held Blood Echoes. For each one discarded, remove 1 token from this card.

_unsupported.need: alternate completion — if Eileen was slain (card 35 timer) before Henryk, completing reveals 37 instead of 36; Eileen ally token is represented as an inert interact survivor token
_unsupported.printedText: Complete this Mission by slaying Henryk: Reveal card 36. If Eileen was slain before Henryk, reveal card 37 instead.

_unsupported.need: end-of-each-Hunter-Turn Enemy Action card flip; Ability/Special removes 1 token; at 0 tokens Eileen is slain, her token removed and this card discarded
_unsupported.printedText: At the end of each Hunter Turn, flip an Enemy Action card. If Ability or Special, remove 1 Insight token from this card. If all tokens are removed, Eileen is slain. Remove her token from the map and discard this card.

_unsupported.need: spawnBoss at Phase 2 (spawnBoss always creates Phase 1)
_unsupported.printedText: Spawn Father Gascoigne (Phase 2) on the Tomb of Oedon {enemy?} space.

_unsupported.need: boss HP cap of 6; 'would be slain → mark with Insight token instead'; no Activate/Pursue; round-end bonus move is 3 spaces (encoded bonusActivationRoundEnd 'moveFourTowardLowestHpAndAttack', off by one space) and attacks lowest-HP Hunter in his space when adjacent
_unsupported.printedText: Gascoigne has 6 HP, but cannot be slain. If Gascoigne would be slain, instead, mark him with an Insight token. He no longer Activates or Pursues. He is not removed on {reset}, but Heals all {dmg} and removes the token. At the end of each round, if Gascoigne is not in a space with a Hunter, he moves 3 spaces towards the nearest Hunter with the lowest HP and Attacks. Otherwise, he Attacks the Hunter in his space with the lowest HP.

_unsupported.need: boss replacement — swap Father Gascoigne for Father Gascoigne Transformed (heal all, Phase 1) and discard card 40 (Boundless Frenzy) and the Tiny Music Box if in play
_unsupported.printedText:
Replace Father Gascoigne with Father Gascoigne Transformed.
Heal all {dmg} from him and reset him to Phase 1. Discard Boundless Frenzy and the Tiny Music Box if in play.

_unsupported.need: spawn an enemy 4 spaces away from a named space revealing tiles as needed, marked with an Insight token, tagged 44, persistent through {reset} but healing all {dmg}
_unsupported.printedText: Spawn a Huntsman's Minion 4 spaces away from the Barred Window space (revealing tiles if needed) and mark it with an Insight token. It is not removed on {reset}, but Heals all {dmg}.

_unsupported.need: carried-token condition — the Bloodied White Ribbon bearer must end the move on Barred Window (encoded as plain endMoveOnTile, same gap as card 27)
_unsupported.printedText: Complete this Mission by ending a move on the Barred Window space with the token: Reveal card 46.

_unsupported.need: reset-loss rule — on {reset} with no Hunter on the token's space, discard the token and the mission
_unsupported.printedText: On {reset}, if no Hunter is on this space, discard this token and this Mission (it can't be completed).

_unsupported.need: spawnEnemy has no respawnOnReset — the Scourge Beast respawns to the Occupied House space on {reset} (arena not used because no Fog Gates are printed)
_unsupported.printedText: Spawn 1 Scourge Beast on the Occupied House space. It respawns to that space on {reset}.

options.label: LIE TO THE GIRL AND KEEP THE SHARD
